moments.title: World Cup Final 2026
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 concludes tomorrow with the final match between Spain and Argentina at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey, USA.

angles.name: Big Game Buzz
angles.copy: It all comes down to this! The FIFA World Cup 2026 Final is tomorrow: Spain vs Argentina. Who are you backing for glory?

angles.name: Global Showdown
angles.copy: The biggest game in football is just hours away. Get ready for the World Cup Final from MetLife Stadium, New Jersey!

angles.name: One Last Time
angles.copy: One final match, one ultimate champion. Who lifts the World Cup trophy tomorrow, Spain or Argentina?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23rd to 26th, featuring headliners like David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: Only a few days to go until Latitude Festival takes over Henham Park! Who's heading to Suffolk for David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi?

angles.name: Suffolk Summer
angles.copy: Get ready, Suffolk! Latitude Festival is almost here, bringing four days of incredible music and entertainment to your doorstep.

angles.name: Lineup Buzz
angles.copy: From main stage headliners like Lewis Capaldi to comedy tents, Latitude always delivers. What are you most excited to see?

moments.title: Happy Birthday M.I.A.
moments.blurb: British rapper, singer, and producer M.I.A. turns 51 today, known for hits like 'Paper Planes' and 'Bad Girls'.

angles.name: Global Sounds
angles.copy: Happy 51st Birthday to the incredible M.I.A.! Still bringing those distinctive beats and powerful messages.

angles.name: Music Icon
angles.copy: From 'Paper Planes' to 'Bad Girls', M.I.A. has always pushed boundaries. Celebrating her 51st birthday today!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Brian May
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday tomorrow, a true rock icon.

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we celebrate the one and only Brian May! Happy 79th Birthday to the guitar legend from Queen.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: From stadium anthems to iconic solos, Brian May has done it all. Wishing him a very happy 79th tomorrow!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Carlos Santana
moments.blurb: Guitar virtuoso Carlos Santana turns 79 on Sunday, known for his unique blend of rock, blues, and Latin American jazz.

angles.name: Sunday Sounds
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate a true guitar legend! Carlos Santana turns 79 this Sunday. What's your favourite Santana track?

angles.name: Smooth Grooves
angles.copy: Still making waves after decades! Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Carlos Santana on Sunday.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Don Henley
moments.blurb: Eagles co-founder and solo artist Don Henley celebrates his 79th birthday on Monday.

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Another rock legend celebrating soon! Don Henley of The Eagles turns 79 on Monday. What's your top Eagles song?

angles.name: Iconic Voice
angles.copy: From 'Hotel California' to his solo hits, Don Henley's voice is unmistakable. Happy 79th for Monday!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Slash
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses lead guitarist Slash, known for his distinctive top hat and incredible solos, turns 61 on Wednesday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Wednesday marks 61 years of rock 'n' roll for the legendary Slash! What's your favourite Guns N' Roses riff?

angles.name: Top Hat & Riffs
angles.copy: The man, the myth, the guitar hero! Wishing Slash a very happy 61st birthday on Wednesday.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Jennifer Lopez
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday next Thursday, a true multi-hyphenate icon.

angles.name: Jenny From The Block
angles.copy: Next Thursday, we're celebrating the one and only J.Lo! Happy 57th Birthday to Jennifer Lopez.

angles.name: Pop Queen
angles.copy: From music to movies, Jennifer Lopez has done it all. Wishing the global icon a fantastic 57th next week!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Mick Jagger
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, turns 83 next Saturday.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Legend
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Mick Jagger turns 83 next Saturday. What's your favourite Stones classic?

angles.name: Ageless Icon
angles.copy: 83 years young for the one and only Mick Jagger next week! The frontman still sets the stage alight.
